questionHtml: Calculate the area of cloth, in cm2, needed to make Haruka’s bag.
markschemeHtml:
* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.

36 × 12 + 2(9 ×12) + 2(9 × 36)      (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for correct substitution into surface area of cuboid formula.

 

= 1300 (cm2)  (1296 (cm2))       (A1)(G2)

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the area of cloth, in cm2, needed to make Haruka’s bag.
